query: motion blur action racing speed dynamic movement
message: sub-element: motion blur in action/racing; intentional blur through camera movement and speed, artistic degradation of clarity; anti-aesthetics focus

response.objective_caption: A close-up view dominated by horizontal streaks of golden-yellow and cool blue light against a dark background. Elongated, indistinct shapes suggest a vehicle or structure passing by rapidly, with light trails and reflections blending together.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: The image utilizes intentional motion blur to transform a passing subject into abstract horizontal streaks of golden-yellow and blue light, smearing distinct forms into fluid bands that emphasize speed and dynamic light trails.
